name: orbit-meeting
description: Orbit Meeting — AI-powered real-time voice translation
author: Eburon AI <hello@eburon.ai>

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,agent -c blue,magenta "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:agent: cd translator && uv run python src/agent.py dev
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n web,electron "pnpm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron electron/main.js"
scripts.pwa:icons: cd public && magick convert icon.svg -resize 192x192 icons/icon-192x192.png && magick convert icon.svg -resize 512x512 icons/icon-512x512.png && magick convert icon.svg -resize 180x180 icons/apple-touch-icon.png && magick convert icon.svg -resize 96x96 icons/favicon-96x96.png && magick convert icon.svg -resize 16x16 favicon.ico && magick convert icon.svg -resize 150x150 icons/mstile-150x150.png
scripts.mobile:dev: concurrently -n web,cap "pnpm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && CAP_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 npx cap run android -l"
scripts.mobile:build: pnpm build && npx cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:build:release: pnpm build && npx cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
